text.message: what do i have to play for except robbing you now?

and it was no reason to blcok me out of the game for a 5 2 spot you could easily have had underneath instead
so im more so blaming you for the way you placed i guess

true, next block is not on you

needed the wood last turn to cut greens road

red how much wood do you have?
